raw_cv_text:
Greetje Schipper
+31 6 4827 3941 // greetje.schipper@gmail.com // https://greetje-schipper.com/docs-portfolio
EDUCATION
University of Amsterdam, Master of Science in Technical Communication 2011 - 2013
Thesis: Localization patterns for API documentation in polyglot microservices environments
Universiteit Utrecht, Bachelor of Arts in Communication Studies 2008 - 2011
EXPERIENCE
Stripe, Staff Technical Writer, Developer Platform June 2021 - Present
Architected and shipped comprehensive documentation strategy for 8 new payment APIs, resulting in 47% reduction in API
integration time for developer onboarding across 2,400+ implementation partners.
Led cross-functional documentation governance initiative spanning 5 engineering teams, establishing standardized OpenAPI
schemas and automated doc generation pipeline that decreased content review cycle from 14 days to 3 days.
Mentored 4 junior technical writers and 2 documentation engineers on developer-first content patterns, elevating team
documentation quality scores from 72% to 91% on developer satisfaction surveys.
Datadog, Senior Technical Writer, Developer Experience March 2018 - May 2021
Owned end-to-end documentation for Datadog Observability SDK suite (12 language bindings), authoring 340+ integration guides
and reducing support ticket volume by 31% through proactive troubleshooting docs.
Pioneered interactive code samples framework using Docusaurus MDX, enabling 85+ runnable examples across CLI, REST, and
gRPC documentation; tracked 2.3M+ views month-over-month.
Championed developer feedback loop by implementing in-doc analytics and user surveys, driving 3 major UX improvements to API
reference pages that increased click-through rates by 56%.
Twilio, Lead Technical Writer September 2015 - February 2018
Managed documentation portfolio for Communications APIs (voice, SMS, video, messaging) covering 10+ SDK languages,
supporting 150,000+ active developers and maintaining 99.2% documentation uptime.
Designed and executed technical writer onboarding program for 6 new hires, creating 180-minute bootcamp modules on API design
patterns and async documentation workflows, reducing time-to-productivity by 8 weeks.
Collaborated with product and engineering leads to establish API versioning documentation standard, eliminating 6 months of
technical debt and enabling seamless transitions for 40,000+ customers across 3 major release cycles.
JetBrains, Technical Writer, Developer Tools June 2013 - August 2015
Created 65+ technical guides and API reference documentation for IntelliJ IDE plugin development ecosystem, reaching 120,000+
monthly active plugin developers and ranking in top 3 JetBrains documentation sets by engagement.
Reduced average plugin developer onboarding time from 6 weeks to 2.5 weeks through streamlined architectural documentation and
12 step-by-step quickstart tutorials covering plugin SDK, build systems, and testing frameworks.
PROJECTS
Developer Documentation Governance Framework, OpenAPI 3.0, Spectacle, GitHub Actions, Python, Markdown 2022 - 2023
Designed and implemented organization-wide documentation standards framework adopted by 12 teams, standardizing 240+ API
specifications and reducing inconsistencies by 89%.
Built automated validation pipeline using GitHub Actions that enforced schema compliance and generated 15+ analytics dashboards
tracking documentation quality metrics across 5 service domains.
EXTRACURRICULAR
Write the Docs, Community Moderator & Conference Speaker 2019 - Present
Moderated 8+ Slack discussions on API documentation best practices with 4,200+ member community, influencing documentation
strategies at organizations including GitHub, Shopify, and Twilio.
Delivered keynote talk 'Scaling Developer Documentation Across Polyglot Teams' at Write the Docs Prague 2023, reaching 380+
attendees with 4.8/5 satisfaction rating.
Developer Documentation Special Interest Group (SIG), Working Group Lead 2021 - Present
Founded and chaired quarterly working group of 25+ technical writers from Fortune 500 tech companies, co-authoring 3 published
whitepapers on API documentation accessibility and developer onboarding metrics.
Established 'Developer Docs Maturity Model' framework adopted by 40+ organizations globally, generating 12,000+ downloads on
GitHub over 2 years.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages: English (Fluent), Dutch (Native), German Tools: Hydrogen (Shopify), Docusaurus, MkDocs, Sphinx, Hugo,
(Intermediate) Figma, Postman, Insomnia, Git, GitHub Pages, Confluence, Jira,
Technologies: API Documentation, OpenAPI/Swagger, LaTeX
GraphQL, REST, Protocol Buffers, gRPC, Kubernetes, Docker,
CI/CD Pipelines
